whatsNew: Added an always-unlocked Original colour scheme option.
Returning Developer Mode items to Automatic now relocks and unclaims anything below its normal requirement.
Ineligible active colour themes automatically return to Original.
Earned badges now enlarge when tapped and launch a confetti celebration.
Badge popups summarise related assignment KSBs as concise one or two word micro-tags.
The information button now remains fixed in the top-right corner while scrolling.
